Hello [supplier name], Thank you for reaching out regarding this cancellation. I can review this order for you today. I show this PO was automatically confirmed as canceled by a Wayfair employee. It does not appear it should have been. This cancellation cannot be reversed. I will be moving this ticket to the Finance Operations Team’s queue to help address your request. Please be on the lookout for their follow-up both on this ticket within 72 hours. Please do not close this ticket until the issue is resolved with their team. For future dispute requests, please enter a General Payment Inquiry ticket or enter a dispute. To enter the General Payment Inquiry ticket, please click submit a ticket on the left hand side in Partner Home > Accounting > General Payment Inquiry. To file a dispute, please use the Finance tab > Payment Summary > Search by the Voucher or PO number the deductions were taken from. > Click View > Click Further Questions to submit a ticket. Note: The Partner Home ticket identifier will change from AOPS- to FINSAP-. Best,

Hi (Supplier Name), Thank you for reaching out about the cancellation of (PO#). I am happy to review the status of this PO with you. Our mutual customer requested cancellation for this order (date+time of request in order trail). This PO was automatically confirmed as canceled. As of January 1st 2024, we have implemented a new cancellation policy that includes the following important changes to cancellations: If a customer requests to cancel within 30 minutes of placing the order, the cancellation will be processed immediately. Orders with a Pending Cancellation status for over 24 hours, excluding weekends, will be automatically canceled. These changes aim to strengthen the relationship with our mutual customers by ensuring a better shopping experience for them. To minimize any impact on your day-to-day operations with us, please familiarize yourself with our updated cancellation policy here: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/2569 Thank you for your continued partnership, and if you have additional questions or concerns for us on this, please don’t hesitate to reach back out in this thread; otherwise, if we’ve addressed all your needs for the time being, I hope you have a great rest of your day! Help us improve by sharing your feedback. You will receive an email shortly with a survey, or you can provide feedback on any closed tickets in Partner Home. We sincerely value your partnership. Best,

Template Use Case/Title: Order cancelled as PO was BO (Cancelled_via_BO)
Text: Hi {SU name}/Team, I understand it can be frustrating when an order is cancelled. This order was delayed by more than 3 business days past its expected ship date. The customer therefore submitted a cancellation request. When an order is delayed by more than 3 business days, a cancellation request from the customer is auto confirmed. This cancellation canno t be undone. If you want to know more about order cancellations, our Partner Home Help Center offers this resource: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/2569 Thanks again for reaching out. This ticket is now marked as complete. If you do need further support with this issue, please add a comment to re-open. Help us improve by sharing your feedback. Template Use Case/Title: Clarification on Replacement Part Cancellation and New Replacement Full Unit (RP_Cancellation_Full_Unit)
Text: Hi {SU name}/Team, Thank you for reaching out for clarification regarding the cancellation of the replacement part and the new replacement PO: (insert PO Number). As per our Replacement Parts 5-Day Ship SLA , effective October 14, 2024, any part requests that are not shipped within 5 calendar days of the request date are automatically canceled. This policy ensures timely resolutions and helps maintain a positive customer experience. In this case, the part was shipped after the 5-day SLA ( (INSERT date scans came through on parts)), resulting in the cancellation of the request per our policy. Wayfair Operations provided an alternative resolution to the customer. Please note that suppliers are responsible for the cost of alternative resolutions raised when the SLA is breached. If you wish to dispute this charge, you can do so via the Deductions section of Wayfair Partner Home. For more information on deductions, please visit our Partner Home Help Center here: https://partners.wayfair.com/help/2/article/2666 Thanks again for reaching out. This ticket is now marked as complete. If you do need further support with this issue, please add a comment to re-open. Help us improve by sharing your feedback.
